task: Inject minions context into Hermes runtime prompts

hadesTelegramFixes.status: Fixed generateCommandResult hardcoded forge context. Added cross-instance dedup. Added bare 'hades' prefix support, forge/general mode switching via 'forge'/'hades' triggers, and persistent conversation modes via telegramConversationModeRepository. All 30 unit tests pass.

minionInjection.status: Implemented minion context injection across Hermes pipeline. buildRuntimePrompt serializes minions into prompt payload. generateDraft, generateCommandResult, buildResponse forward minions. telegramBotRuntime accepts minions in context. hades.service loads minions via scopedRepos in chat() and handleTelegramWebhook(). 30/30 tests pass.
